message:
feat: add steer endpoint and paginate Anthropic ListModels

Add POST /steer endpoint so the TUI can inject steering messages into
a running session. Paginate the Anthropic models API to handle large
model lists correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -177,6 +177,7 @@ func startEmbedded(ctx context.Context, cfg embeddedConfig) (*embeddedServer, er
 // wireSession updates server callbacks to point at the given session.
 func (e *embeddedServer) wireSession(sess *agent.Session) {
 	e.srv.SetCompactFunc(sess.Compact)
+	e.srv.SetSteerFunc(sess.Steer)
 	e.srv.SetContextPressureFunc(sess.ContextPressure)
 	e.srv.SetModelFunc(sess.SetModel)
 	e.srv.SetClearFunc(e.clearSession)

@@ -100,6 +100,7 @@ func runServe(args []string) error {
 
 	srv := server.NewServer(server.ServerConfig{})
 	srv.SetCompactFunc(sess.Compact)
+	srv.SetSteerFunc(sess.Steer)
 	srv.SetContextPressureFunc(sess.ContextPressure)
 	srv.SetModelFunc(sess.SetModel)
 	srv.SetListModelsFunc(cmdutil.ListModelsFunc(client, profile.ID()))
